comment: Customer reports the package arrived with a cracked screen and is requesting an expedited replacement before the weekend.
Inquiry about whether the extended warranty covers accidental water damage; awaiting confirmation from the policy team.
Duplicate charge appeared on the monthly statement after the failed checkout retried three times; needs a refund issued.
The mobile app crashes on launch after the latest update; reproduced on two separate devices running the current OS.
Requesting clarification on the return window since the original order confirmation email listed conflicting dates.
